category_sources: Official Temporal docs describe Temporal as an open-source platform for reliable applications and workflows.
source_facts.description says this is the CLI for running and interacting with Temporal Server and UI.
display_name_sources: Official Temporal setup page refers to installing the Temporal CLI.
source_facts.name is temporal and source_facts.description identifies the command-line interface.
docs_sources: Official Temporal documentation is hosted at docs.temporal.io.
Official Temporal setup page documents installing the Temporal CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/temporalio/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Temporal docs describe workflows, reliable applications, and platform usage.
source_facts.description identifies the Temporal CLI and server interaction.
